title: Unit Chart Team Roster (per-unit data)

div.p: One dot per person, grouped by team. Each dot carries its own data (name and role), so hovering a dot shows that individual, not the team total. Team leads carry their own colour, tinting a single dot within the cluster.
div.div:
{{ charts[0] }}
Engineering Design Sales Team lead

vanilla-js-script: // Nothing extra to wire: the chart renders from the options above. ROSTER and // rosterTooltip live in the shared head script.
react-script: // Nothing extra to wire: the chart renders from the options above. ROSTER and // rosterTooltip live in the shared head script.
vue-script: // Nothing extra to wire: the chart renders from the options above. ROSTER and // rosterTooltip live in the shared head script.
